task_completion.description: Verify that EdrawMax is open and a central process node labeled 'Online Order Processing System' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax interface is visible with a central shape on the canvas containing the exact text 'Online Order Processing System'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the four required external entity nodes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct shapes surrounding the central process, containing the exact labels: 'Customer', 'Payment Gateway', 'Inventory Database', and 'Shipping Provider'.

task_completion.description: Verify the data flows between the central process and the Customer/Payment Gateway entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Directional arrows connecting Customer to Central (labeled 'Order Request'), Central to Customer (labeled 'Order Confirmation'), Central to Payment Gateway (labeled 'Payment Details'), and Payment Gateway to Central (labeled 'Payment Status').

task_completion.description: Verify the data flows between the central process and the Inventory Database/Shipping Provider entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Directional arrows connecting Central to Inventory (labeled 'Stock Query'), Inventory to Central (labeled 'Stock Availability'), Central to Shipping (labeled 'Shipping Request'), and Shipping to Central (labeled 'Tracking Number').

task_completion.description: Verify that the project is saved to the specified EDDX file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the EdrawMax window title bar shows the filename 'dfd_context_diagram.eddx', or a file manager shows the file in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is exported as a PNG image to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing 'dfd_context_diagram.png' being saved, or a file manager/image viewer showing the exported PNG file in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application interface with the diagram being actively constructed on the canvas, rather than terminal commands generating the files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's native save and export features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save and Export dialog boxes from within EdrawMax should be visible during the file creation process.

integrity.description: Verify the diagram was built from scratch and not loaded from a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show progressive creation of the diagram (e.g., adding nodes, then drawing arrows, then adding text labels) across multiple screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected EDDX file path is '/home/ga/Diagrams/dfd_context_diagram.eddx' (minimum size 10000 bytes). The expected PNG file path is '/home/ga/Diagrams/dfd_context_diagram.png' (minimum size 20000 bytes). The diagram must contain exactly these 13 labels: 'Online Order Processing System', 'Customer', 'Payment Gateway', 'Inventory Database', 'Shipping Provider', 'Order Request', 'Order Confirmation', 'Payment Details', 'Payment Status', 'Stock Query', 'Stock Availability', 'Shipping Request', and 'Tracking Number'.
